TITLE: Netflix to start offering live TV

CONTENT: Netflix to start offering live TV A photo of a person about to watch Netflix on a screen inside an apartment , during the coronavirus lockdown in Dublin . On Wednesday , January 13 , 2021 , in Dublin , Ireland . ( Photo by Artur Widak/NurPhoto via Getty Images ) Stay on top of the latest issues at home and abroad by signing up to our FREE daily newsletter Something went wrong , please try again later.Invalid Email We use your sign-up to provide content in ways you 've consented to and to improve our understanding of you . This may include adverts from us and 3rd parties based on our understanding . You can unsubscribe at any time . More info Netflix continues to radically change up its business model , this time by entering the live TV arena , as it faces into what could be a prolonged period of declining growth . The world 's biggest streaming platform confirmed to Deadline it is developing technology to stream live TV for an array of unscripted shows and stand-up specials . Top line As Deadline reported , live @ @ @ @ @ @ @ @ @ @ use it for live voting for competition series and talent contests such as its upcoming dance competition series Dance 100 fromThe Circle producer Studio Lambert . " It would also offer Netflix the chance to stream other live content such as its hit comedy festival Netflix Is A Joke . The festival has attracted some of the biggest names in comedy , such as Dave Chappelle , Larry David and Pete Davidson . Live streaming would pit it directly against cable shows and terrestrial TV channels . A question of sport The big question that will surely be asked of Netflix is whether it will begin showing live sports , which is a huge money earner for traditional broadcasters . Netflix has dipped its toe in sports before , most recently and successfully with its F1 series Drive to Survive . However , the contracts for top-tier sporting events are massively expensive and Deadline reports live sports events are not part of Netflix 's immediate plans . Netflix and the need for change Live TV on Netflix is only part of the changes ongoing @ @ @ @ @ @ @ @ @ @ report showed that the company is grappling with people moving away from the streamer . What 's more , competition is growing more fierce in the streaming industry , especially from Disney Plus . Netflix could also abandon its policy of not having adverts on its platform as it prepares to roll out a subscription service that includes ads at some stage this year .

TITLE: Roger Daltrey threatens to walk out of The Who gig after smelling ...

CONTENT: @ @ @ @ @ @ @ @ @ @ the middle of a gig in New York this week after smelling a fan smoking marijuana . As seen in the video below , Daltrey told audience members at the Nassau Colliseum on Wednesday ( May 20 ) that " the show will be over " unless the person smoking stopped . " It 's your choice , I ca n't do anything about it . I 'm doing my best . " Having explained that he is allergic to the smoke and that it causes problems with his vocal performance , fans began chanting " eat it " while bandmate Pete Townshend suggested he uses the drug using rectal administration . " Up your fucking arse , " Daltrey added , suggesting , " it 's the quickest way . " Newsday reports that Daltrey 's vocal performance was noticeably inhibited by the smoke . " The smoke 's impact was almost immediate on his voice , which went from crystal clear and potent for the opening ' I Ca n't Explain ' to something rougher and more limited during ' I Can See For Miles ' . " @ @ @ @ @ @ @ @ @ @ he does n't enjoy playing live . He stated : " I always feel very sad when I say this because I think I 'm unusual in this respect . People do n't really believe me . But I do n't enjoy performing . I do n't feel uplifted on the stage . I rarely have moments these days onstage when I go into what jazz musicians call ' the zone . ' I rarely lose myself on the stage . " It was recently announced that the Who will be the third , and final , headliner for Glastonbury 2015 . The band -- currently marking their 50th anniversary -- will headline the festival , with Paul Weller performing in the slot directly before them . The two acts will perform on the Pyramid Stage on Sunday ( June 28 ) and join fellow headliners Kanye West and Foo Fighters on the bill .
